agents_page_subtitle: Configure AI role and authorization for each account.
agents_roster_subtitle: {accounts, plural, one {# account} other {# accounts}} · {queries, plural, one {# query pending} other {# queries pending}} · {active, plural, one {# agent active} other {# agents active}}
agents_empty: No accounts yet. Add one under Settings → Accounts to configure its agent.
agents_role_description_ph: Describe this agent's responsibilities and focus areas…
agents_role_description_over_limit: Keep the role description under {max} characters.
agents_auth_manual_desc: AI suggests only. You write and send.
agents_auth_semi_desc: AI drafts replies. You approve before sending.
agents_full_auto_warning: Emails with attachments, amounts, or important contacts will always require your approval.
agents_full_auto_dialog_body: In Full Auto mode, this agent will send replies without your approval. Emails with attachments, amounts, or important contacts will always be downgraded to draft. Do you want to continue?
primary_account_tooltip: The primary account represents you in the Team channel and is used as the default sender.
set_primary_confirm_body: {name} ({email}) will become your primary account. Its agent will represent you in the Team channel and act as the default sender. The current primary will be demoted.
delete_primary_blocked: Switch the primary account to another account before removing this one.
